raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad nu Jewtus us Mizpu
pee fawa Namma nahze/ reds tad
isgahje winna Meita winnam
pretti ar Bungahm un Stabu-
lehn/ un winna bija tifkat weena
weeniga/ un winnam ne bij bes
tahs/ net Dehts nei Meita.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 35,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kad wiꞥſch to redſeja/
faplohtija wiꞥſch fawas Drehbes/
un fazzija: Ak manna Meita! tu
effi maun lohziht nolohzijſti/ un tu
effi starp teem/ kas mann apbeh-
dina/ jo es eſmu fawn Mutti at-
darrijs preekſch to KUNGU/ un
ne warru atrantees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 36,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un winna fazzija nſ to:
Mans Tehws/eſſi tu tawu Mutti
preekſch to KUNGU atdarrijs /
tad darri man/ itt ka tas no ta-
was Muttes irr tsgahjis/ pehz to/
ka tas KUNGS tew irr atreebis
prett faweein Genaidneekeem no
teem Ammona Behrneem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 37,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un winna fazzija us fawu
Tehwu: lai fcht Leeta pee man no-
teek/ dohd man Waltu dtwi Meh-
netchus/ ka es eemu / un no-eemu
Kalnôs/un apraudaju fawu Jum-
prawibn / es ar fawahin Bee-
drehtm.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 38,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch fazzija: Eij/un
wiꞥſch atlatde to dtwi Mehne-
ſchus/tad nogahje winna ar fa-
wahin Beedrehtm / un apraudaja
fawu Jumprawibn Kalnôs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 39,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un pehz dtwi Mehneſcheim
atgresahs ta pee fawa Tehwa/un ja ar Eewraimu / un tee Wihrı no
"
    },
    {
      "n": 40,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas tappe weens Lib
kums eekſch Israëta / ka Israë-
Meitas ik Gaddus nogahje/Jew-
tus ta Gileaditerna Meitu tschet
DeenasGads-fahrtá noschehloht
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ad tappe Eewräimi
Wihrı fafaukti / un te-
gahje prett Seemeta pu-
ji/ un fazzija us Jewtu: Rapehz
eſſi tu gahjis karroht prett teem
Ammona Behrneem / un ne effi
muhs atzinajs / ka mehs ar teu-
buhtum lihdſi gabjuſchi? mehs fa-
dedſinaſini tawu Nammu ar teu-
ar Uggunt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Jewtus fazzija us teem:
man un manneem Laudim btja
dands Bahrfchanas ar teem Am-
mora Behrneem / un es luhdsu
juhs/ bet juhs ne iſpestijat mann
no winnu Rohkas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad es nu redſeju juhs ne tz-
pestijam/tad likku es fawu Dweh-
elti fawá Rohká / un gahju prett
Ammona Behrneem / un tas
KUNG S nodeve tohs manna
Rohká/kapehz tad juhs effat scho-
deem pee man nahkuschi prett
mann karrohtz
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Jewtus fapulzeja wiſſing
Wthrus no Gileadas/ un karro-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
